entry.title: Re: Report for change history of fixed asset
entry.content: Is there now a report to list changes applied for all fixed assets?

entry.title: Copy the Equipment Class from the Material Master to the Equipment Master
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Whenever Equipment is created with Equipment category “S” and “P”, the  class and characteristics must be copied from the material to the newly created equipment.

On analysis we have found that this can be achieved through Customer Exit "Enhancement - IEQM0003Component - EXIT_SAPMIEQ0_001 " and we were unable to find a suitable BADI. As Customer Exit falls under Tier 3 of clean core approach, wanted to check if there an alternative way to achieve the functionality.

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: SAP Meetup New York City May 2025 - Meet the champion!
entry.content:
Hello SAP New Yorker Enthusiasts,

This is a quick call for a spontaneous meetup!

The amazing @walid  is coming to NYC, and we’d love to gather for a simple and relaxed get-together. Whether you're a developer, an SAP expert, or just tech-curious, this is a great chance to connect with like-minded SAP professionals in a casual setting. 🎉

🗓 Date: May 9th, 2025
🕔 Time: 6:30 PM
📍 Location: Katz (?)

We're considering Katz's Delicatessen for the meetup—it’s a New York classic, and no trip here is complete without trying it! Suggestions for other spots are welcome, especially as we get a sense of how many people will join.

No specific agenda—just SAP lovers sharing stories, laughs, and maybe a pastrami sandwich or two. 😄

entry.title: Re: Get onboard with the latest SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding solution in 6 weeks!
entry.content:
Join our upcoming webinar! Preparing for the Latest Onboarding Solution: Key Steps for a Smooth Transition (AMER/EMEA: May 13th, APJ: May 14th) 

Join our product experts for tor this webinar on key benefits and best practices for transitioning to the latest SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding solution. As we approach the end of maintenance for Onboarding "1.0" in November 2025 and its full depreciation in May 2026, it's crucial to understand how you can prepare effectively. Register today!

AMER/EMEA: Tuesday, May 13th | 10:00-11:00 am EDT | 16:00-17:00 CEST
APAC: Wednesday, May 14th | 9:00-10:00 am SGT | 6:30-7:40 am IST

entry.title: Re: Configure outbound Scenario from S/4 to CPI
entry.content:
Hi shashankagg,
Could you please provide more detail, such as what kind of data you want to integrate and which systems you want to replicate data for? For public cloud, we have general help documentation.

Extend and Integrate Your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition > Integration > Communication Management
While for every scenario, we also have set-up instruction available.

Best regards,
Irene

entry.title: Re: Upload Tax Rates -SAP S4 Public Cloud

entry.title: Re: CDS views for Manage Workforce app SAP Public Cloud 2502
entry.content:
Hi @vk36 

If you want to get email address information based on Person External ID(Worker ID) via CDS view, then you need to create a custom CDS view with I_WorkforcePerson and follow the association to get Workplace information.

Or if you are using Business partner i.e. Employee business partner number to fetch email address information, then you can directly use I_BusinessUserBasic which would give both Business User and the workplace related information like email address.

Alternatively you can also check I_WorkplaceAddress but a BP GUID is needed for this CDS view.

For documentation of those CDS views, kindly search in the help page CDS Views.

Best regards,
Irene

entry.title: Re: Automatic Batch Determination Issue in EWM (S/4HANA Cloud 2502)

entry.title: Re: MODIFICATION OF THE VALUATION CLASS IN PRODUCT MASTER DATA
entry.content: Hi Ismael, Thank you for joining the community. I have informed the potential expert in this area for answering your question. Best Regards, Irene

entry.title: Re: Calling an OData V4 custom action from within an iFlow.
entry.content:
I've got calling the custom action to work using the HTTP adapter. This is what I did to get the CSRF working:

1) Do a HTTP GET on anything supported by the service. E.g. /$metadata. Need to pass X-CSRF-Token=Fetch in the request header

2) This prompts the backend system to generate a CSRF token and pass it back in the response header. I used this Groovy script to pull out the CSRF token and the session cookies and store them in properties. 

3) Now pass both the X-CSRF-Token and Cookies to the POST operation. Tip: the cookies are passed back from the original GET in header field Set-Cookies. When passing them in the request header to the POST you need to use header field Cookies.

This is my first iFlow, so it's probably not an ideal solution, but it works. Hope this helps someone.

- Anthony.

entry.title: Re: SAC Story Time dimension issue (Previous year data di...
entry.content: Yes, you even use script to set a default value for the current date input control on story loading, and then user is still able to change it.

entry.title: Re: AI Agent
entry.content: Do you know if it's already available to use? I'd like to try it for demo purposes if it is

entry.title: Re: How to Analyze Profit Margin for BOMs with Item Category Groups CPFH and DISH Based on Custom CD
entry.content:
Hi there,

Hope someone can help me here, thanks in advance.

The information provided is really helpful.

I am working on Sales Kit scenario: CPFH and encountered a problem. 

Updated the main item in the material master to CPFH at the Item Category Group

From the "Incompletion log", complaining about pricing, why is that?

Any other settings or config need to done to fix this?

Regards

Wendy

entry.title: Re: How to send attachments in purchase order outputs?
entry.content:
Great post! A couple of questions.

- Followed the config and got to the point I could only manually add an output with attachment but the Email output stays "in Preparation". Without attachment, it went out ok. Am I missing something?

- Does the same config work for Private cloud?

entry.title: Log in as another CB user
entry.content:
Hi Expert !

I would like to confirm how to log in as a CB user.

My CB user is CB9980000043 and I log in with this ID.

I created a user in the App "Manage Workforce".
I would like to log in using the additional user I created. Is there any way to do this?

Soma

I already tried on both opensuse 15.3 and linux mint 19. I'm installing 7.52

entry.title: Active Directory Plus On Prem - Integration
entry.content:
Hi,

We are looking to integrate SuccessFactors Employee Central with MS Active Directory Plus on Prem. At the moment its managed by loading a bunch of CSV files. I would like to see if there are any better solutions. 

Has anyone managed to connect directly?

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Session | APAC | English
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Have you recently requested provisioning of SAP Cloud ALM? We are thrilled to welcome you aboard! Your journey with #SAP Cloud ALM is about to begin, and we’re here to ensure it is smooth and efficient.

To assist you in this journey, we would like to invite you to one of the below online webinars where we’ll guide you through the setup process and answer any questions you may have.

What to Expect in the Webinar

The SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Webinar has been designed to ensure that you and your team are set up for success. During the session, we will:

  • Demonstrate the initial login procedures to access your SAP Cloud ALM tenant.
  • Provide guidance on the next steps to use the solution effectively.
  • Highlight essential training resources to support you and your team’s learning journey.
  • Answer any questions you may have during the session.

Your Next Steps

To make the most of your SAP Cloud ALM onboarding experience, here’s what you need to do:

  1. Share this information with your key stakeholders.

    • Ensure that IT Admins, Project Leads, and Implementation or Operations Partners responsible for SAP Cloud ALM are informed.
    • Don’t forget to forward the webinar invitation to your project implementation partner for their participation.

  2. Register for the Webinar.
    Register Now

We’re excited to embark on this journey with you! Let’s make the most of SAP Cloud ALM together. See you at the webinar!

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Session | EMEA | NA | LAC | English
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Have you recently requested provisioning of SAP Cloud ALM? We are thrilled to welcome you aboard! Your journey with SAP Cloud ALM is about to begin, and we’re here to ensure it is smooth and efficient.

  • Demonstrate the initial login procedures to access your SAP Cloud ALM tenant.
  • Provide guidance on the next steps to use the solution effectively.
  • Highlight essential training resources to support you and your team’s learning journey.
  • Answer any questions you may have during the session.

To make the most of your SAP Cloud ALM onboarding experience, here’s what you need to do:

  1. Share this information with your key stakeholders.

    • Ensure that IT Admins, Project Leads, and Implementation or Operations Partners responsible for SAP Cloud ALM are informed.
    • Don’t forget to forward the webinar invitation to your project implementation partner for their participation.

  2. Register for the Webinar.
    Register Now

We’re excited to embark on this journey with you! Let’s make the most of SAP Cloud ALM together. See you at the webinar!

entry.title: CC users not receiving the correct email
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Good day!

I just want to ask why am I receiving the wrong email template as CC?

Instead of the e-wallet number cc email confirmation, I am getting the EC_Submit_Request which is for the approver?

Is there something wrong with my configuration?

Thank you for all the help.

Best Regards,

Gelo

entry.title: Re: History of deleted COGI records
entry.content: Reshare the same please., having same issue.

entry.title: Re: Scheduling replication of exchange rates to C4C with DRF
entry.content: hello Markus, thank you for the sharing. I have the similar requirement now, but it is mentioned in note 2779534 this service is not enabled for scheduling. I'd like to check if this solution works well in your case? thank you very much! https://me.sap.com/notes/2779534/E

entry.title: Customer Hierarchy In Condition Contract / delta accrual
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I am using a customer hierarchy node in a condition table for a condition contract. The accruals are generated via the normal SD F2 invoice and the customer hierarchy works fine. But when doing a delta accrual, the pricing analysis shows that the value for the customer hierarchy isnt found, while using the same condition table as in the SD invoice pricing. Any idea what the cause of this is.

entry.title: Re: Transporting standard table from DEV to PROD
entry.content: Capture content in a trasnport in se16 -> Check in transport of  object type 'TABU'(short text - Table Contents') then move this trasnport to PROD and Import it in PROD &Check in PROD Data will be available.

entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Have you recently requested provisioning of SAP Cloud ALM? We are thrilled to welcome you aboard! Your journey with #SAP Cloud ALM is about to begin, and we’re here to ensure it is smooth and efficient.

To assist you in this journey, we would like to invite you to one of the below online webinars where we’ll guide you through the setup process and answer any questions you may have.

entry.title: Re: 1H 2025 - Automatically on - VRP-14767 - Compensation...
entry.content: Balaji, we are working on resolving this. Will provide an update once the fix is available.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere license just to consume data in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Is a separate Datasphere license required solely for consuming data in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)? If a user has an SAC license and the SAC reports retrieve data from Datasphere, does the user also need a Datasphere license? Note that the SAC user does not need to log in to Datasphere.

Best Regards
Arvind

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM 환영 웨비나 | 대한민국
entry.content:
안녕하세요 고객 여러분,

 

SAP Cloud ALM을 사용하기로 결정하신 것을 기쁘게 생각합니다. SAP Cloud ALM 을 사용하기 위한 처음 단계에 필요한 모든 중요 정보가 들어 있는 “Access information for SAP Cloud ALM” 이메일을 최근에 받으셨을 것입니다.

더불어서 SAP는 처음으로 SAP를 사용하기 시작한 고객에게 실시간으로 직접적인 지원을 제공 하고자 합니다. 따라서 귀하와 모든 신규 SAP Cloud ALM 고객을 위해 21 May 에 아래 내용이 포함된 웹세션을 제공할 예정 입니다.

 

• SAP Cloud ALM에 처음 로그인하는 단계
• 첫 번째 로그인 후 일반적인 다음 단계에 대한 설명
• 고객을 위한 필수 SAP Cloud ALM 학습 자료를 찾는 방법
• 알아두면 도움이 되는 잠재적인 문제에 대한 팁
• 참석 고객의 질문에 대한 답변 및 안내 제공

 

등록 링크

APJ (한국 고객)을 위한  SAP Cloud ALM 신규 고객 웰컴 한국어 세션:  21 May 2:00 PM KST

Register Here

감사합니다.

SAP Cloud ALM  고객 관리 팀

entry.title: SAP CHOTA TALKS HYDERABAD 2025 (Q2) - Hyderabad Coming Soon
entry.content:
Dear All,

In the blooming month of May, when ideas flourish like spring flowers, the eagerly anticipated SAP CHOTA TALKS 2025 Q2 will once again open its doors to the curious and the visionary.

 

This quarterly celebration of technological brilliance serves as both lighthouse and laboratory—illuminating emerging trends while crafting the future blueprint of enterprise innovation.

Mark your calendars. Set your compasses. The stage is being set for a May rendezvous that promises to transform how we envision, implement, and elevate the SAP experience.

 

Hyderabad SAP Community, get ready! SAP CHOTA TALKS 2025 (Q2) is coming your way this May!

The countdown to inspiration has begun.

Help us tailor the SAP CHOTA TALKS HYDERABAD 2025 (Q2)

We want your input:

1.Why Attend? What makes these meetups truly valuable for you personally or professionally?

2.Your Challenges? What specific SAP topics, trends, or problems are you currently grappling with that insights could help solve?

3.Best Format? What kind of session helps you learn best? (e.g., Speaker Sessions? Panel Discussions ? Deep Dives? Ask Anything  Panels? Hands-on Demos? Dedicated Networking time? Customer success stories? More informal discussions? Product Demos?)

Share your thoughts below! 👇 Let's co-create a great Q2 experience.

#SAPChotaTalks #Hyderabad #SAPCommunity #SCTHYD #SCT2025Q2 #SAP #TechEvent #SAPCommunity

@VASAVI Rongali @Ruthvik_Chowdary  @KatherineKenneally @lauraschmitz @                          @PoonamGojeSing @Fathima Shaik @vidya Chandran @Naresh Dasika @Dileep Saketi

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALMをお申し込みいただいたお客様向けウェルカムセッション（日本語開催）
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALMテナントにお申し込みいただいたお客様

 

平素より弊社製品、サービスをご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。

 

このメールは、SAP Cloud ALMテナントにお申し込みいただいたお客様へお送りしております。SAP Cloud ALMの初期設定方法と機能概要をご紹介する、日本語リモートセッションです。参加費はかかりませんので、お気軽にご参加ください。

 

セッション名：SAP Cloud ALM Welcome Session

日時：4月24日（水）午前10時～11時30分（日本時間）

 

以下の内容を日本語でご説明いたします（資料は英語です）。

 

• SAP Cloud ALMへの初回アクセス方法

• ユーザー追加と初期設定方法

• 機能概要の紹介とデモ

• 役立つ資料・サイトのご案内

• Q&A

 

セッションへのお申し込みは、以下のリンクからお願いいたします。

5月23日 午前10時～11時30分（日本時間）

Register Now

entry.title: how to get participant handbook for codejam re: event based processes
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm currently following a codejam blog regarding event-based processes for sap build. here is the link of my current lesson: 3 - Explore SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh | SAP Tutorials

one of the prerequisite is a "participants handbook" which contains the system and credentials needed to follow the blog.

where can i get this? thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements : CDS And Overview Page-Part 2
entry.content: @MANYAM_MURALI@Swin  : Will be uploaded in next few days 🙂  Sorry to keep you waiting.

entry.title: Re: Ariba : Report containing PR and PO numbers
entry.content: Instead of using report in SBN, you may look into the report in Ariba B&I, in that space you should be able to find the info you need.

entry.title: Re: SF Learning Delegation Email Link on ILX
entry.content: Thank you for your response. I appreciate the clarification on the steps to act as a delegate. However, my query pertains to the email notification sent to a delegate, which includes a token labelled "Direct Link to Delegation Task." Previously, this link allowed the delegate to access the delegator's approval page directly, without additional steps such as clicking on "act as." I would be grateful for your insights on this matter.

entry.title: Re: AI Agent
entry.content:
Hi Darma,

AI Agents in SAP is integrated through SAP Joule strategy and SAP AI Core/Foundation.

S/4 HANA Public Cloud: AI Agent available via Joule

S/4 HANA Private Cloud:  Via AI Core Foundation (BTP)

SAP BTP: available via AI Core

Enable via,  Entitlements → Add Service: AI Core & AI Foundation (not available in 'trial').

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Upload/copy paste to table level not to model in SAP...
entry.content:
If copy & paste not preferred and upload starter is not feasible( because model year & factory is not part of user data),  my only suggest would be:

  1. Still use upload starter to upload user data to factory =  # and model year = #
  2. Run data action to allocate uploaded data to desired factory/model year combination based on your pre-filled ratio/weight.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere CLI & Python: Exporting Modeling Objects to CSV Files for Each Artifact
entry.content: Nice

entry.title: RSP Execution Failed
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am currently facing an RSP issue. The system health check is always failing. Does anyone here have any idea?

entry.title: Re: Transporting standard table from DEV to PROD
entry.content:
Hi,

interesting reply, but SAP Note

2449129 - Table Entry -> Transport Entries grey out in SE16 

should be mentioned.

Kind Regards

entry.title: Re: Express document "Update was terminated" for BAPI BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2
entry.content:
Hi,

can you share the SM13 entries for this error,

Try to call the BAPI function with BACKGROUND TASK, if this doesnt work, then try below.

also try to call the BAPI function inside a custom wrapper function with UPDATE TASK, custom function should be start delayed with update.

entry.title: Re: CC users not receiving the correct email
entry.content:
Hi Gelo,
Are the document generation templates used in Approver and CC steps in same document generation group?

Does the subject user's default locale match the language set in document generation template?

Best regards, Ashley

entry.title: Re: Log in as another CB user
entry.content:
Hi Soma,

It's not possible.

Would like to know what's the business requirement behind.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: Default a custom field value into a standard field
entry.content: I think so, you can always describe the logic in CRD request document, and the TL will review and check feasibility.

entry.title: Re: Skills in Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
Hi Sam,

We are moving to TIH however the migration seems to be possible to only Competency Attribute in TIH? 
My concern is we no longer use the term competency anymore and for us it is "Skills" in all the systems. 

When you say renaming in the above comment - can you expand on where can we do this to no have to do a double migration of data from competency attribute to skill attribute

 

Thanks

Vandana

entry.title: Re: Internal Customer Material Codes with Supplier Produc...
entry.content:
Did you check if the Commodity Code Mappings file can fill your requirement?

In that file, you can maintain the mapping of commodity code/SKU/Product ID between customer side and supplier side.

Regards,

Sirui

entry.title: Re: Name change event in Intelligent Services
entry.content: Hi tarungupta, As onPostSave rule could not compare current value and previous value directly, we would have to have a custom-string field to store previous value, and then compare the current value with custom-string field value in onPostSave rule. The custom-string field value could be set via onSave rule once the relevant value is changed. Hope the answer helps. Best regards, Ashley

entry.title: Re: Create Maintenance Order App
entry.content:
Hello @Esnowy 

For business catalog and role, App details please check Fiori apps library SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library

User defaults are not applicable for Web Dynpro apps.

Hope this helps.

BR,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: Need API to Fetch Customer Hierarchies in S/4HANA Pub...
entry.content:
Thanks @Jeremy_Deo

In my tenant instance I am not able to find  standard interface views I_CustomerHierarchyNode and I_CustomerHierarchy in the browser views app.

Note that I am using SAP S/4HANA public cloud.

And also, are there specific roles I need because I have the

BR_ADMINISTRATOR , BR_EXTENSIBILITY_SPEC

assigned to me.

Even when I am assigned these roles, on the CDS views App the create new CDS view is not active.
Thank you so much

entry.title: Re: Synchronization between Plant Maintenance and Accounting Assets (Manual)
entry.content:
Greetings,

have you tried changing the initially created equipments from M to V? This way you don't need any additinal equipment and manual linking to an asset.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: SAP Public cloud margin analysis
entry.content: Removed general tag.

entry.title: Re: SAP Public cloud margin analysis
entry.content:
Hello 

Please check the segment definition in APP Manage Allocations.
Under 'Receiver Bases' tab, here you defined 'Reference Base' for Retained and Relevant to Reference fields.

For example: Customer Group 01/Product Sold Group L001/.../Account 5111100000, etc.

Then sender value should be distributed as reference data, when system trying to distribute value, reference data following above combination could not be found.

Best Regard,
Owen

entry.title: Crystal Reports Viewer cannot print or export
entry.content:
I have Crystal Reports in Visual Studio 2019.  All of a sudden I cannot print or export a report.  I get a selection Dialog box to select which export type and when I click on the button to export, the box disappears and nothing happens.    This is within Visual Studio and also on a website that has the compiled application.

Do I need an update to my Crystal Reports or the runtime?  It might have happened after a Windows update.

entry.title: Re: Cost centre not hitting when Posting accruals for freight charges using "Monitor accruals a
entry.content: Removed general tag.

entry.title: Re: PTO (Project Team Orientation) SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello @AMT1 ,

The Project Guideline Template accelerator can be used to provide new project members with essential information needed to understand the project and its associated administrative and technical regulations for setup.

Let me know if its something else you're looking for.

BR,

Vijay

entry.title: Skills & Attributes Mapping
entry.content:
Hi,

We have migrated to TIH in our lower instance to test the functionality. The major concern is as a apart of migration all the competencies from COC ( we call them skills) are moved under Competency attribute of TIH. Is there a way to migrate them under Skill Attribute?

I checked migrated attributes in TIH and the provision to change the Attribute type to Skills seems to be greyed out. I was hoping this could be one way to fix the migration back to attributes entity. Does anyone have any suggestions to get us back to correct attribute type "Skills" in TIH
- Note we use JPB with section configured as competency types and Recruiting.

entry.title: Re: Support on a query
entry.content:
Hi,

How about this version where you get the stock from the warehouse that was set on the row level of the order:

SELECT T0.[DocNum], T0.DocDate,T1.[ShipDate], T0.CardName
     , T1.[ItemCode], T1.[Dscription], T1.[Quantity], T2.[Code]
     , (T2.[Quantity]*T1.[OpenQty]) as [Requirement]
     , w.OnHand as [In Stock]
     , i.IsCommited as [Committed]
     , i.OnOrder as [PO]
     ,' ' as [Data]
FROM ORDR T0 
     INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry] 
     inner join ITT1 T2 on T2.Father =T1.ItemCode
     INNER JOIN OITM i ON T1.ItemCode = i.ItemCode
     INNER JOIN OITW w ON T1.ItemCode = w.ItemCode AND T1.WhsCode = w.WhsCode
WHERE T1.[OpenQty] >0 and T0.[DocDate] >=[%0] and T0.[DocDate] <=[%1]

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Old Memo Text Appearing on Top of All Journal Entries...
entry.content:
Also, "Boot macht Gut". Did you test closing and restarting the client?

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Git: /bin/bash: warning: setlocale: LC_ALL: cannot ch...
entry.content:
Try to run : 

Command: 
zypper in glibc-locale
export LC_ALL=en_US
echo $LC_ALL


Example: 
root@:/etc# zypper in glibc-locale
Loading repository data...
Reading installed packages...
'glibc-locale' is already installed.
No update candidate for 'glibc-locale-2.38-150600.14.17.2.x86_64'. The highest available version is already installed.
Resolving package dependencies...
Nothing to do.

root@:~# export LC_ALL=en_US
root@:~# echo $LC_ALL
en_US


root@:/etc# cat /etc/locale.conf
LANG=en_US.UTF-8
LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8

entry.title: Re: Scope item 1GA "in deprecation" - will it be replaced and should it still be used in a
entry.content:

I've forwarded the question to the experts.

entry.title: Unable to debug Adobe Javascript code in Adobe LiveCycle Designer
entry.content:
Hi All

 

We are facing an issue with Adobe LiveCycle Designer( Remote desktop). It appears that the software does not provide a built-in JavaScript debugger, which makes it challenging to debug code efficiently. We have done the debugger settings in  Acrobat Reader, however we don’t have Acrobat Professional in our system( Remote desktop).

Could you please let  us know if we have to install  Acrobat Professional  to resolve this issue or any other suggestions is really appreciated.

Thanks & Regards,

Rajeswari

entry.title: FI-AA: Asset below-zero value
entry.content:
Dear Guru,

there is one asset which contain amount which marked as Below-zero value as in snapshot:

i am trying to run depreciation in tcode: AFAB gets error message:

Error when creating line items using line item schema SAP_500_724...

Message No. AA548

Diagnosis

The system found inconsistencies in the structure of the FI document line items. Line item schema SAP_500_724 does not provide reliable results in relation to posting to the general ledger.


Procedure

Check line item schema SAP_500_724 for this posting transaction. There are two possible causes for the error:
1. A value field was updated on the asset, and this value field is updated to a reconciliation account in FI (for example, an asset balance sheet account, accumulated depreciation or down payments), but there is no line item defined for this value field in the line item schema.
2. The error message can also be caused by incorrect account allocation. In order to find out if you have incorrect account allocations in the account determination for Asset Accounting, carry out a consistency check of the accounts. The consistency check is part of FI-AA Customizing.

i couldn't why it does happen, please help.

thanks,

RTN

entry.title: Re: Transport Management in SAP CALM Tool
entry.content:
Hello,

 

May I know how to check process of transports in Calm for Public cloud.

Any links are highly appreciated.

entry.title: PA document doesn't create correctly
entry.content:
Dear Guru,

i found out the PA Document doesn't create correctly in goods receipt. basically, if goods receipt post as following Accounting Entries:
Expense……………….Dr

GR/IR Clearing…………………CR

the PA document must have the same debit side in expense 51xxxx100
but it created Credit side for second line,

result in tcode: KE24

help to explain why it does happend. where can we fix it?

Thanks,

RTN

entry.title: Re: Facing issue of email alerts are not able to send.
entry.content:
Hi Krishna42

Please check issue with help of below guided
answer:https://ga.support.sap.com/dtp/viewer/index.html#/tree/2977/actions/44405

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Configuring CICD For Monorepository
entry.content:
Hi I would love to know how to configure an SAP CICD Job for a mono repository. for instance when you have your frontend application, backend application and other services all present in one folder, how will you configure the pipeline to achieve separation of concern, given that you are allowed only one .pipeline file with one config.yaml file when configuring the Infrastructure as a Code but you need each of this application to have its own job?.

Also I have tried many options like copying the .pipeline file into the folder of each application but that never works as somehow during the build the SAP CICD always comes outside the root folder in that  git repository to look for a .pipeline file and when i doeas not find this throws an error.

Also Have tried running a command like cd /frontendApplication as a runFirst command before a particular stage (eg Release stage) and this also never works.

Would be nice if anyone with better experience on how to handle mono repositories help me resolve thios issue or provide ideas on how to go about this. 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Transport Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 3-System Landscape: From Basics to Comp
entry.content:
Hello ,

Is there a chance to track transports in 2sl system 

Eg :Calm etc..., or any links highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: EWM move same HU between warehouses
entry.content: thank you, so I think my proposal is correct to use MRP / STO and internal / external range to achieve planning and same HU transport. Also is there easier solution for manual transfers between warehouses like based on the HU only? I already read some old discussion - only I found was request for HU transfer only and requestor was redirected to influence ticket, but maybe something changed already...

entry.title: Event Propagation in SAP GTT from Tracking Unit in Freight Units/Freight Bookings
entry.content: Hi everyone, I’m currently in the process of implementing SAP GTT and have already made significant progress. However, I’m now facing the following challenge: In my scenario, I’m using freight units as tracking units, and I’m also receiving these events from the data provider. But how are these events propagated to the correct objects (Shipments, FUs)? Is this done via the Event to Action Script? Can anyone help me with this? Here’s the link Scenario 3: Generate Tracking Units based on Freight Unit | SAP Help Portal to the scenario I’m using, where it’s also clearly visible in the diagram how the events can be propagated. gib dazu ein suject

entry.title: Re: oninit rule not triggered after employee import
entry.content:
It depends on the requirement.

If the value 5 is only needed to be auto-filled during hire process, then onSave rule would use here as a workaround.

However, if you need this field value in "if" condition in another rule, then there is no workaround, you would have to provide it in imported file as well.

entry.title: Accelerating Business Objectives with AI in PLM software by SAP
entry.content:
Introduction:

The intersection of business and technology has paved the way for innovative solutions designed to optimise workflows, fuel efficiency, and accelerate growth. One such revolutionary advancement is Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) software from SAP, a platform devised to manage product-related data throughout the design and development process. Let's explore how AI can boost business objectives in the design phase of PLM.

The Need for AI in the Design Phase:

Traditional design processes often entail time-consuming, error-prone activities and difficulty in estimating market trends and customer preferences. Embracing AI can help to navigate these challenges. AI’s data-driven insights, automation of mundane tasks, and improved accuracy can significantly heighten efficiency during the design phase.

Potential of AI Capabilities in PLM software:

Predictive analytics can streamline the forecast of market trends and aid early identification of potential design flaws. Machine learning optimises design processes and can suggest enhancements using pattern recognition from historical data. Natural language processing aids in better team communication and derives valuable insights from unstructured data.

 

Achieving Business Objectives Faster and with Certainty:

AI integration in PLM software can accelerate time-to-market by streamlining the design process and enabling faster decision-making using AI recommendations. Enhanced product quality is achieved through data-driven design enhancements, minimising errors, and reworks. AI-driven creativity can foster innovation, revealing new design possibilities.

Implementation Strategies:

Integrating AI into PLM software commences with a comprehensive assessment of existing capabilities and needs, selecting suitable AI tools, and training teams for smooth adoption. Potential challenges like resistance to change and data security concerns also need addressing.

Conclusion:

Artificial Intelligence integration in PLM software can prove to be a powerful tool in modernising the design phase of product development. Embracing this technological innovation can propel businesses forward, paving the way for enhanced efficiency, productivity, and overall success. Incorporating AI within the PLM framework is undoubtedly a promising prospect for businesses aiming to achieve their objectives faster. It's time we explore the infinite possibilities AI proffers in the realm of PLM and navigate towards a new era of growth and technical sophistication.

Remember that integrating this advanced technology requires careful planning and execution, but the benefits that it yields will certainly make the journey worth it. So, steer your business towards the future by accelerating your objectives with AI in PLM software by SAP.

entry.title: Re: BADI or Function Module for WT update with HU Without...
entry.content:
Hi @dacor

/SCWM/WHO_WHOHU_UPDATE - Please check this Function Module.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Create a PDF with password without command execute
entry.content: Hi Folks, I have a requirement to create a PDF with password protection. I have search it in the forums, but the solution require us to put a program in the server and using command line. We are not allowed to do that. Even if it allowed the use of code open dataset and using command line is showed P1 in ATC since we are using this for ABAP RAP( ABAP Cloud Ready). Is there any other solution?

entry.title: sap transports tracking in 2sl system
entry.content:
Hello team,

 

I would like to know is there any possibility to tracking of transports in 2sl system for public cloud as it is causing so many disruptions between people who is having access for it .

 

kindly let us know the possibilities to track changes  before transporting it

entry.title: How can I skip the maintenance request screening step?
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

the standard process for reactive maintenance includes a step to accept a maintenance requests (App "Screen maintenance requests"). I would like to skip this step, so that all maintenance requests are accepted automatically (or I can create a maintenance order based on a not accepted maintenance request).
Do you have any ideas how to implement this?

System: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

BR
Simon
